title: ECL per-Eidolon profile base v1
description: Vendored from eidolons-ecl/schemas/per-eidolon/_base-profile.v1.json (ECL v1.0.0). Common YAML frontmatter required of any artefact wrapped by an ECL envelope. Each kind-specific profile extends this with its own required keys. ECL v1.0 §3.1.

eidolon.description: Eidolon slug that emitted this artefact.

kind.description: Artefact kind slug. MUST equal the envelope's artifact.kind.

thread_id.description: RECOMMENDED: mirror the envelope's thread_id so the artefact carries its own provenance.

evidence_anchors_count.description: Number of path:line citations in the body. Used by conformance gate when the contract sets evidence_anchor_required: true.
